obs: Interested in setting up a trust fund for child's education. Benefits include tax efficiency, asset protection, and preventing financial mismanagement. Consulted with estate planning attorney.
Planning to make lump sum contribution plus potential stock donations to education trust. Wants to ensure well-funded education for child.
Born in Manila, Philippines. Excited to share cultural heritage with wife's family. Planning to cook traditional Filipino dishes for them.

Doing yoga as part of exercise routine. Takes yoga classes for recovery and flexibility. Practicing active listening communication techniques.
Has puppy named Rocky. Rocky attends training classes on Saturdays morning. Slowly learning to sit and stay.

Recently took great photos of blooming flowers and trees on April 20. Experimenting with macro photography for first time. Using continuous autofocus on Sony Alpha a6400.

Planning camping trip next weekend. Interested in eco-friendly camping gear including biodegradable soap, shampoo, reusable utensils and plates.

Recently purchased refillable glass bottle of all-purpose cleaner using natural essential oils. Satisfied with effectiveness and pleasant aroma. Conscious effort to reduce carbon footprint past 3 months.
Planning BBQ party. Wants to invest in new patio set for large group. Considering durable, comfortable, easy-to-clean outdoor furniture.
Recently used up favorite Sweet Baby Ray's at friend's place on June 17. Needs restock. Interested in trying other BBQ sauce brands.
Recently made Korean-style BBQ beef short ribs from online recipe. Interested in experimenting with gochujang in marinades. Familiar with gochujang and exploring its uses.
Recently tried apple wood chips for first time, added fruity flavor to grilled chicken. Wants to explore other wood types for Korean BBQ.
Smoked beef brisket for 4 hours last week. Turned out incredibly tender and flavorful. Dry rub: salt, pepper, garlic powder, paprika. Let sit for hours to penetrate.
Smokes at 225-250F for 4-5 hours until 160F internal temp. Uses water pan for moisture. Prefers hickory wood chips. Experimented with apple and cherry wood too.
Served smoked brisket with coleslaw and baked beans. Planning grilled corn and collard greens for next BBQ. Interested in various wood chip pairings.
Gets home from work around 6:30pm on weekdays. Has about one hour to make dinner. Interested in simple, quick meals like one-pot pasta and chicken fajitas.

Looking for language learning podcasts. Interested in Coffee Break, News in Slow, French Pod 101, 60-Second Italian, Spanish Obsessed, Learn Japanese Podcast.

Used to browse designer boutiques at mall. Now more drawn to H&M and Zara. Considering environmental impact of fast fashion. Interested in sustainable fashion brands.
Looking into Everlane and Patagonia. Appreciates their sustainability commitment and transparency. Expects stylish affordable options available.
Making crochet blanket for sister's birthday in 2 weeks. Working 5-6 hours each weekend. About halfway done. Planning single crochet border.
Leaning toward single crochet border - easiest and quickest option. Tips on joining border yarn without bulkiness. Want invisible join or slip stitch.
Got new IKEA shelving unit. Planning to organize all craft supplies by type and color. Looking forward to having organized workspace.
Using Habitica app for habit tracking. Set goal to limit social media use to 1 hour daily. Suggested by assistant as gamified habit tracker.

Looking into online photography courses. Started tracking social media usage with app. Has 1 hour daily social media limit goal.

Comparing Udemy and Skillshare. Udemy: $20-200 per course, 30-day refund. Skillshare: $15/month premium or $99/year, 30-day refund.

Considering CamelCamelCamel, Keepa, Honey Droplist, PriceZombie, Slickdeals, Flipp for tracking kitchen appliance prices across multiple retailers.

Started using cloud-based backup service to store important files. Gives peace of mind about data loss.
Considering Google Drive (15GB free), Dropbox (2GB free), OneDrive (5GB free), iCloud (5GB free), pCloud (10GB free), Box (10GB free).
Currently has 8GB RAM. Thinking of upgrading to 16GB. Desktop RAM upgrade last month made huge difference. Runs Adobe Premiere Pro and plays Overwatch, League of Legends.

Deleting old files and uninstalling unused apps to free up laptop storage. Has been helpful. Looking for storage optimization tips.
Expanding product line to include savory items. Developing flavored nuts recipes for Saturday morning farmers' market.
Sells products at Saturday morning farmers' market doing well. Planning new flavored nuts product line. Considering 10% discount for 3-batch bundle.
Planning to update Instagram with more photos and behind-the-scenes content. Using high-quality visuals, variety of content types, engaging captions, user-generated content.
Creating 'Saturday Morning Farmers' Market Bundle' with selection of best-selling flavors, fresh fruit, nuts. Planning 15% discount.
Investing in new tent and decorative elements for stall visual appeal. Plans include focal point, tiered displays, attractive packaging, signage, plants, rustic accents.
Adding plants to bedroom for air purification and calm atmosphere. Interested in low-light plants: Snake Plant, ZZ Plant, Pothos, Peace Lily, Dracaena, Philodendron.
Planning Snake Plant on nightstand. Water sparingly, allow soil to dry between waterings. Prefers 65-75F, low light. Fertilize rarely during spring/summer.
Planning Peace Lily on shelf near window. Prefers moist but not waterlogged soil. Water when top 1-2 inches dry. Reduce watering in winter. Needs 70-80F.
Snake Plant: repot every 2-3 years, 1-2 sizes larger, prefer slightly root-bound. Peace Lily: repot every 2-3 years, 1-2 sizes larger, prefer some room to grow.
Using well-draining potting soil for both plants. Options: Miracle-Gro, Black Kow, Espoma Organic, Pro-Mix. Orchid mix for Peace Lily, cactus mix for Snake Plant possible.
Planning light packing for NYC next month. Recently bought $80 backpack from outlet store. Not bringing hair dryer or straightening iron.
Traveled to Boston previously with carry-on only. Packed very light. No spare clothes. This time will pack spare socks, undergarments, lightweight top.
Planning to pack energy bars, nuts, dried fruits, instant oatmeal for NYC trip. Tips: use resealable bags, compress, roll tightly, dedicate compartment.
Really into indie rock music lately. Listening while commuting to/from work. Discovered artists through Spotify Discover Weekly. Loves The Black Keys.
Looking for driving music recommendations. Likes Arctic Monkeys and Foo Fighters. Interested in upbeat, energetic, mellow, and nostalgic options.
Following photography accounts on Instagram for inspiration. Interested in music blogs: Pitchfork, NME, Stereogum, Consequence, Indie Shuffle.

Feeling inspired to start writing music again. Interested in music blogs and podcasts to stay updated. Interested in songwriting and lyric writing tips.
Eaten at 3 Korean BBQ restaurants, especially Hwang's bulgogi. Planning to make Korean dishes at home. Requesting bulgogi and other Korean dish recipes.
Classic bulgogi with beef, garlic, ginger, soy, chili flakes, brown sugar, sesame oil. Marinate 2+ hours or overnight. Grill 3-4 min per side.
Experimenting with gochujang in recipes. Adding 1-2 tsp to bulgogi marinade. Can reduce brown sugar due to gochujang sweetness. Different gochujang types have varying heat levels.
Planning Korean-themed dinner party. Serving bulgogi with appetizers (kimchi, mandu, pajeon, bokkeumbap) and side dishes (sigeumchi, gyeranjjim, oi muchim).
Experimenting with jasmine, basmati, sushi rice. For Korean dishes, recommends short-grain rice: Korean japonica, Calrose, or Mochigome for stickiness and flavor.
Making ssamjang sauce (gochujang, soy, garlic, ginger, brown sugar, water, sesame oil) as side for bulgogi. Guests can customize to taste.
Attended evening service at Baptist Church last Sunday. Guest pastor's sermon on forgiveness resonated. Planning to attend weekly prayer meetings.
Interested in volunteering at food bank. Close to St. Mary's Church attended 3 Sundays ago. Easily accessible from home for regular commitment.
Typical food bank tasks: food sorting by type/date, packing into boxes/bags, distribution, inventory management, administrative tasks. May require food safety training.
Running freelance writing services. Recently collaborated with graphic designer friend last week to cross-promote on social media. Was very successful.
Planning social media campaign. Before/After posts showing writing improvements. Behind-the-scenes, Q&A, case studies, tips, featured projects, testimonials.
Likes Before/After post idea for showcasing writing skills. Using Canva to create visually appealing comparisons. Can also use Pablo, Snagit, PowerPoint, Google Slides.
Writing compelling captions: focus on benefits, use social proof/testimonials, highlight unique value, keep concise, conversational tone, include CTA.
Recent social media collaboration with graphic designer reached new audience. Planning more collaborations. Finding partners on social media, networking events, LinkedIn.
Planning to guest blog to build relationships. Finding opportunities via search engines, directories (MyBlogGuest), social media, industry leaders, blog commenting.
Creating lead magnet to attract clients: ebook/guide, webinar, templates, checklist, case study, success story. Promoting via website CTA, email, social media, partnerships.
Meditates regularly. Recommended to meditate before meals or 1+ hour after. Digestive process distracting during meditation.
Tips for improving mindfulness: focus on breath, use mantra, practice regularly, avoid distractions, don't judge mind wandering.
Beginner meditator. Guided meditations helpful: provide instructions, help focus, step-by-step process. Available on apps, websites, podcasts. Need to find trusted teacher.
Learning about Maori vs European settler cultural differences: language, religion, land ownership, traditions. Led to tensions and New Zealand Wars.
New Zealand efforts: Treaty of Waitangi Act 1970s, Maori cultural resurgence, educational inclusion, ancestral land returns, addressing socioeconomic inequalities.
Believes other nations can learn from New Zealand's reconciliation approach: recognize indigenous cultures, meaningful dialogue, meaningful decision-making roles, support revitalization.

Planning 4-5 day road trip to North Cascades National Park from Portland. Stopping in Leavenworth Bavarian-themed town on way.
Staying downtown Leavenworth for shops/restaurants. Interested in German cuisine: Andreas Keller, Munchen Haus, Leavenworth Sausage Garten. Wants authentic schnitzel, sauerbraten.
Has mountain road experience. Highway 20 prone to rockfall/avalanches/washouts. Diablo Lake Road narrow with steep drop-offs. Cascade River Road is gravel.
Choosing downtown Leavenworth location for heart of action, shops, restaurants. Not concerned about noise. Leavenworth Village Inn and Icicle Village Resort options.
